/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/eadapter.dir/main.cpp.o -o eadapter  libbroker.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_date_time.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libpqxx.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/postgresql@14/libpq.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib
